## What changed?

Briefly describe the change and its user impact.

## Why?

Explain the problem this pull request solves.

## Testing

Describe what you tested.

* [ ] `make verify` passes
* [ ] I tested the relevant feature locally
* [ ] I added or updated tests where needed

## Checklist

* [ ] My branch and commit names follow project conventions
* [ ] I did not add private media, local paths, databases, secrets, or cache files
* [ ] I updated documentation when needed
* [ ] I added screenshots for meaningful UI changes

## Screenshots

Add screenshots or recordings here when the pull request changes the interface.
